title: BEM-568 fix smoke py syntax
objective:
Run script:
"""
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
smoke=scripts/'claude_token_smoke.py'
smoke.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path

TOKEN = os.environ.get("CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN", "")
STATUS = "secret_present" if TOKEN else "secret_missing"
BLOCKER = None if TOKEN else {"code": "CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_MISSING"}

reports_dir = Path("governance/reports")
transport_dir = Path("governance/transport")
reports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

report_path = reports_dir / "bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md"
lines = [
    "# BEM-568 | Claude Token Secret Smoke | " + STATUS,
    "",
    "Дата: workflow_runtime",
    "",
    "## Result",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence check: " + STATUS,
    "",
    "## Security",
    "Token value was not printed.",
    "",
    "## Blocker",
    "null" if BLOCKER is None else json.dumps(BLOCKER, ensure_ascii=False),
    "",
]
report_path.write_text("\\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")

record = {
    "record_type": "claude_token_secret_smoke",
    "cycle_id": "bem568-claude-token-secret-smoke",
    "source": "github-actions",
    "status": STATUS,
    "artifact_path": str(report_path),
    "commit_sha": None,
    "blocker": BLOCKER,
    "created_at": "workflow_runtime",
}
with (transport_dir / "results.jsonl").open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n")

print("CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence check:", STATUS)
''')
# local syntax check via compile only, no token access
source=smoke.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
compile(source, str(smoke), 'exec')
report=reports/'bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_py.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-568 | Fix Claude Token Smoke Python | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 21:03 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\n`scripts/claude_token_smoke.py` syntax fixed and compile-checked.\n\n## Security\nToken value is not read during compile check and is never printed by runtime script.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
record={'record_type':'bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_py','cycle_id':'bem568-fix-claude-token-smoke-py','source':'gpt','status':'completed','script':str(smoke),'compile_check':'pass','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 21:03 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_py']={'status':'completed','script':str(smoke),'compile_check':'pass','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 21:03 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_py.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-568 PASS: claude_token_smoke.py syntax fixed and compile-checked.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(smoke),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Fixed claude_token_smoke.py SyntaxError with safe list-based report writer and compile check')
